Title: Verify Your Phone
EnterPhoneDescription: Enter your phone number to receive a verification code. This helps us keep the community secure.
ReferralCodeHelper: Have a referral code? Enter it to move up in the queue!
EnterCodeDescription: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your phone.
SuccessMessage: Your position in the queue is #{0}. We'll notify you when you're approved.
ReferralBenefit: Share this code with friends to move up in the queue!
